zh.lifeSummary: 當Elger, Count Of Honstein於大約1160年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 皮爾納霍韓斯坦時，他的父親Elger I von Honstein-Ilfeld31歲，母親Bertrade Countess Of Kirchberg27歲。他於1191年與Burggravin Oda von Magdeburg在德國薩辛馬格德包格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1219年9月23日享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elger, Count Of Honstein于大约1160年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 皮爾納霍韓斯坦时，他的父亲Elger I von Honstein-Ilfeld31岁，母亲Bertrade Countess Of Kirchberg27岁。他于1191年与Burggravin Oda von Magdeburg在德国薩辛馬格德包格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1219年9月23日享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Honstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from a place so named near Dresden.

variants.name: Hohenstein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Georg, Hans.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of various places so named.
German: topographic name composed of Middle High German hōhen, an inflected form of hōch ‘high’ + stein ‘rock’.

nameMeanings.name: Elger,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Count
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

variants.name: Earl
meanings: North American: from the title originally adopted as a nickname parallel to Duke , King , etc. The title was used in England in Norman times as an equivalent of the French comte ‘count’ it is from Old English eorl ‘warrior, nobleman, prince’. In some cases the given name may have been taken from the surname Earl, which was originally either a nickname or a term denoting someone who worked in the household of an earl.

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Elger, Count Of Honstein was born about 1160, in Hohnstein, Kreis Pirna, Saxony, Germany, his father, Elger I von Honstein-Ilfeld, was 31 and his mother, Bertrade Countess Of Kirchberg, was 27. He married Burggravin Oda von Magdeburg in 1191, in Magdeburg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 September 1219, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elger, Count Of Honstein est né environ 1160, à Hohnstein, Kreis Pirna, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Elger I von Honstein-Ilfeld, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Bertrade Countess Of Kirchberg, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Burggravin Oda von Magdeburg en 1191, à Magdeburg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1219, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elger, Count Of Honstein um 1160 in Hohnstein, Kreis Pirna, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Elger I von Honstein-Ilfeld 31 und seine Mutter Bertrade Countess Of Kirchberg 27. Er hat 1191 in Magdeburg, Sachsen, Deutschland Burggravin Oda von Magdeburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. September 1219 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elger, Count Of Honstein è nato il circa 1160 nel Hohnstein, Kreis Pirna, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Elger I von Honstein-Ilfeld, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Bertrade Countess Of Kirchberg, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Burggravin Oda von Magdeburg nel 1191, nel Magdeburg, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 settembre 1219, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elger, Count Of Honsteinが約1160年にドイツサチセンクレイス ピルナホーンステインで生まれた時，父Elger I von Honstein-Ilfeldは31歳，母Bertrade Countess Of Kirchbergは27歳であった。1191年にドイツサチセンマグデブルグでBurggravin Oda von Magdeburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1219年9月23日に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elger, Count Of Honstein(이)가 대략 1160년 독일 작센 크레이스 피른아 호h스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Elger I von Honstein-Ilfeld(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertrade Countess Of Kirchberg(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1191년 독일 작센 막그데버그에서 Burggravin Oda von Magdeburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1219년 9월 23일 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elger, Count Of Honstein nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Hohnstein, Kreis Pirna, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Elger I von Honstein-Ilfeld, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Bertrade Countess Of Kirchberg, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Burggravin Oda von Magdeburg em 1191, em Magdeburg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1219, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elger, Count Of Honstein родился около 1160 г. в местности хохнстин, крис пирна, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Elger I von Honstein-Ilfeld было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Bertrade Countess Of Kirchberg, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Burggravin Oda von Magdeburg в 1191 г. в местности магдебург, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 сентября 1219 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elger, Count Of Honstein nació aproximadamente 1160, en Hohnstein, Kreis Pirna, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Elger I von Honstein-Ilfeld, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Bertrade Countess Of Kirchberg, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Burggravin Oda von Magdeburg en 1191, en Magdeburg, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1219, a la edad de 60 años.
